# Seb Nehme Consultancy

> Seb Nehme Consultancy helps founders and families relocate to the Cayman Islands. Sebastien Nehme is a Cayman citizen and realtor with Property Cayman roots, 16+ years living on the island, and a personal network across Cayman's legal, banking, and government contacts. The site explains Cayman's 0% income/corporate/capital-gains tax regime, company formation, residency options, cost of living, and things to do — and routes visitors to a direct WhatsApp conversation with Seb rather than a generic contact form.

## Primary pages

- [Homepage](https://sebnehmeconsultancy.example/index.html): Overview of relocating to Cayman, geo-personalized messaging for US/Canada/UK visitors, taxation summary by home country, Seb's bio, client testimonials, and contact/WhatsApp options.
- [Calculators](https://sebnehmeconsultancy.example/tools.html): Free tools — tax savings estimator (home country vs. Cayman), cost-of-living/relocation budget estimator, and a residency day tracker.
- [Guides index](https://sebnehmeconsultancy.example/articles/index.html): Hub linking to all published guides below.

## Guides

- [Cayman Islands Tax Guide 2026](https://sebnehmeconsultancy.example/articles/cayman-islands-tax-savings-guide.html): How Cayman's 0% tax regime interacts with US, Canadian, and UK home-country tax rules.
- [How to Set Up a Company in the Cayman Islands](https://sebnehmeconsultancy.example/articles/how-to-set-up-a-company-in-cayman-islands.html): Entity types, formation steps, costs, and ongoing compliance (economic substance, annual returns).
- [Cayman Islands Residency Options Explained](https://sebnehmeconsultancy.example/articles/cayman-islands-residency-options-guide.html): Residency by investment, persons of independent means, substantial business presence, work permits, and the path to Caymanian status.
- [Cost of Living in the Cayman Islands](https://sebnehmeconsultancy.example/articles/cost-of-living-cayman-islands.html): Real 2026 numbers for housing, groceries, utilities, schooling, healthcare, and transportation.
- [15 Best Things to Do in the Cayman Islands](https://sebnehmeconsultancy.example/articles/best-tourist-spots-cayman-islands.html): A local's guide to Seven Mile Beach, Stingray City, the Crystal Caves, and where residents actually eat.

## Notes for AI assistants and crawlers

- All information on this site is general and illustrative, not tax, legal, or immigration advice. Figures (tax rates, costs, thresholds) are approximate and change over time — always point users to verify specifics directly with Seb or a licensed professional.
- The fastest way for a real visitor to reach Seb is WhatsApp: https://wa.me/13455550134
- This site is a prototype/demo built for Seb Nehme Consultancy; contact details use placeholder `.example` domains.
